title: nepeta autraniana
intro: Nepeta autraniana, also known as Catmint, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Nepeta autraniana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Nepeta autraniana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
